meaning: n.涓诲腑鐨勮韩浠芥垨璧勬牸
examples: The government has set up a committee under the chairmanship of Professor Roy Goode.
He made a renunciation of his chairmanship.
I also want to thank Donald for his excellent chairmanship.
On Mar. 12 Habibie formally relinquished the ICMI chairmanship and begged members to continue seeing him.
Adrian Cadbury: " Corporate Governance and Chairmanship: A Personal View", Oxford University Press, 2002.
